title: Private board

posts.author: Taigo (Itai Golan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

we’re new on Monday- using the standard plan.
it would be super useful if each user will have at least 1 private board (i know the feature is not included in this plan, but we don’t need any of the other features in the Pro plan). this will save each of us having a separate app such as Trello/notes/Evernote for running our personal stuff. we would like to have “all in 1” app, that allows both work related things but also handling private issues.
thanks!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Itai

If you’re on the standard plan, you can use shareable boards for this same functionality. They function the same as private boards, with the only difference being that shareable boards allow you to also invite guests into the board.

  • The difference between board types

Let me know if this could work for you!
